tags.name: general/gimmick
tags.description: Focused on a single unique design or gameplay idea.

tags.name: general/2B
tags.description: Includes gameplay elements with two or more objects placed simultaneously.

tags.name: general/slider only
tags.description: Restricts object choice to sliders only.

tags.name: general/circle only
tags.description: Restricts object choice to circles only.

tags.name: general/swing
tags.description: Uses 1/3, 1/6, and 1/12 snap divisors for most/all objects.

tags.name: meta_information/collab
tags.description: A map with two or more associated mappers.

tags.name: meta_information/megacollab
tags.description: A map with 8 or more associated mappers.

tags.name: meta_information/marathon
tags.description: A map with a drain time of over 5 minutes.

tags.name: meta_information/gungathon
tags.description: A map with a drain time of over 10 minutes.

tags.name: meta_information/multi-song
tags.description: Contains multiple songs within the audio.

tags.name: meta_information/variable timing
tags.description: Contains multiple timing points, usually for non-metronome songs.

tags.name: meta_information/accelerating bpm
tags.description: Features progressively increasing tempo.

tags.name: meta_information/time signatures
tags.description: Many changes or uncommon time signatures.

tags.name: meta_information/storyboard
tags.description: Contains a storyboard that enhances gameplay experience.

tags.name: meta_information/storyboard gimmick
tags.description: Uses storyboard elements that change how the map is played.

tags.name: meta_information/keysounds
tags.description: Uses various pitched hitsounds to create a melody.

tags.name: meta_information/download unavailable
tags.description: Cannot be downloaded from the osu! website.

tags.name: meta_information/custom skin
tags.description: Utilizes custom skin elements and graphics.

tags.name: meta_information/featured artist
tags.description: Features song(s) from osu!'s Featured Artist listing.

tags.name: meta_information/custom song
tags.description: Maps a song made specifically for the map.

tags.name: style/messy
tags.description: Visually chaotic and disorganised patterns.

tags.name: style/geometric
tags.description: Incorporates geometric shapes within the design.

tags.name: style/grid snap
tags.description: Objects are placed along a square grid.

tags.name: style/hexgrid
tags.description: Objects are placed along a hexagonal grid.

tags.name: style/freeform
tags.description: A loose approach to visual structure.

tags.name: style/symmetrical
tags.description: Employs symmetry within the design.

tags.name: style/old-style revival
tags.description: Emulates a style from early mapping.

tags.name: style/clean
tags.description: Visually uncluttered and organised patterns.

tags.name: style/slidershapes
tags.description: Uses a variety of slider designs.

tags.name: style/distance snapped
tags.description: Uses osu's built-in distance snap feature.

tags.name: style/iNiS-style
tags.description: Originates from the original DS games.

tags.name: style/avant-garde
tags.description: Experimental design philosophies.

tags.name: style/perfect stacks
tags.description: Features perfectly overlapped stacked notes.

tags.name: style/ninja spinners
tags.description: Features very short spinners.

tags.name: song_representation/simple
tags.description: Accessible and straightforward design.

tags.name: song_representation/chaotic
tags.description: Unpredictable map design.

tags.name: song_representation/repetition
tags.description: Features recognizable identical patterns.

tags.name: song_representation/progression
tags.description: Gradual advancement in difficulty.

tags.name: song_representation/high contrast
tags.description: Uses flashy ideas to follow music changes.

tags.name: song_representation/improvisation
tags.description: Uses patterns that do not directly match the music.

tags.name: song_representation/playfield usage
tags.description: Deliberate use of the playfield.

tags.name: song_representation/playfield constraint
tags.description: Restricts object placement to a part of the playfield.

tags.name: song_representation/video gimmick
tags.description: References the background video in its patterning.

tags.name: song_representation/difficulty spike
tags.description: A sudden, significant challenge increase.

tags.name: song_representation/low sv
tags.description: Prominent low slider velocity usage.

tags.name: song_representation/high sv
tags.description: Prominent high slider velocity usage.

tags.name: song_representation/colorhax
tags.description: Intentional use of combo colors for immersion.

tags.name: skillsets/tech
tags.description: Tests uncommon skills.

tags.name: skillsets/slider tech
tags.description: Tests skills involving complex sliders.

tags.name: skillsets/complex sv
tags.description: Large changes in slider velocity to test reading.

tags.name: skillsets/reading
tags.description: Tests a player's reading skill.

tags.name: skillsets/visually dense
tags.description: Patterns with many visible notes that make reading hard.

tags.name: skillsets/overlap reading
tags.description: Overlapped objects obscure note order.

tags.name: aim/jump aim
tags.description: Focuses heavily on jumps.

tags.name: aim/sharp aim
tags.description: Heavy use of sharp angle movement.

tags.name: aim/wide aim
tags.description: Uses wide angle movement patterns.

tags.name: aim/linear aim
tags.description: Requires continuous straight movement.

tags.name: aim/aim control
tags.description: Features abrupt velocity or direction changes.

tags.name: aim/flow aim
tags.description: Encourages fully continuous cursor movement.

tags.name: aim/precision
tags.description: Requires fine, precise cursor movement.

tags.name: tap/finger control
tags.description: Tests complex tapping ability.

tags.name: tap/complex snap divisors
tags.description: Uses unusual snap divisors.

tags.name: tap/bursts
tags.description: Continuous alternating patterns, typically 9 notes or less.

tags.name: tap/streams
tags.description: Continuous alternating patterns, typically more than 9 notes.

tags.name: tap/spaced streams
tags.description: Streams with large spacing between notes.

tags.name: tap/cutstreams
tags.description: Streams with very uneven spacing.

tags.name: tap/stamina
tags.description: Tests endurance over long periods.

tags.name: scene/aspire
tags.description: Uses glitches for unique effects.

tags.name: scene/mapping contest
tags.description: An entry for a mapping contest.

tags.name: scene/tournament custom
tags.description: A custom map for a tournament.

tags.name: scene/tag
tags.description: Designed for multiplayer tag mode.

tags.name: scene/port
tags.description: Originally created for other media then imported.
